title: MCP Client sub-node fails to load parameter options
symptom: When importing a workflow via the API, the MCP Client sub-node throws an error stating 'Required', causing the workflow to halt.
not_this_if: MCP Client sub-node is not included
root_cause: The MCP Client sub-node requires a 'typeVersion' parameter to initialize properly when imported via the API. If this parameter is missing, it cannot load the necessary options, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Edit the JSON of the workflow to include 'typeVersion' for the MCP Client sub-node
Ensure all required parameters are included in the JSON
Re-import the workflow via the API
agent_instruction: Include 'typeVersion' in the MCP Client sub-node settings in the workflow JSON before importing.
